raw_consumer_statement:
A {$1900.00} payment was sent to Citibank/Home Depot on XX/XX/year> to pay off my account. The check was cashed/deposited, yet the balance was never credited. Despite multiple phone calls and written correspondence, Home Depot continues to state the matter is under investigation.

I have provided a copy of the cashed check from the consolidation company, which clearly shows it was payable to Citibank and includes my name and account number. As of today, the account remains unpaid due to Citibanks failure to properly apply the payment.
